title: How to Stop a Recurring Dream
original_title: How to Stop a Recurring Dream
overview: After Mum and Dad announce an imminent, split custody separation, Yakira--the oldest daughter in a broken family - kidnaps her estranged younger sister and takes to the road, in an attempt to reconnect before they part.
